data.body:
Remediation complete (2 commits: 7622149b fixes, 6426ab81 coverage tests).

VERIFIED + FIXED prior-art gotchas:
- #1 bare `if:` always-true → lint rejects non-`${{}}` guards; executor fails closed (executor.py/lint.py)
- #3 secrets in `if:` → lint rejects (control flow must not branch on a credential)
- #4 duplicate YAML keys → loader rejects (schema.py construct_mapping)
- #19 tarfile.data_filter on Python <3.11.4 → _require_safe_extraction fails closed (snapshot.py)
- #20 git-archive child zombie/FD leak → wait()+close pipes on error
- #21 file-count cap added; TTL sweep restores write bits so read-only snapshot trees are GC'd (executor.py sweep)
- #24 JUnit wrapped in <testsuites> + quoteattr + failure body (eval.py to_junit)
- #25 grader snapshot must be embedded in pinned model id (eval.py validate_scorer)
- #27 unsatisfiable at_least(k>epochs) gate rejected
- run_eval → NotImplementedError (not EvalError) when live harness unwired
- #30/#31 prompt front-matter survives CRLF/BOM
- #32 declared-optional vars default to empty (match prompt_input_schema)
- #33 variant overlay unions base+variant variables/required when splicing base

NOT a defect (no code change): #14/#15/#16 (include_raw/parsing_error/pairing) were
stale ACs on the closed WS-D4 ticket, not code — runner.py's docstrings already
accurately describe ToolStrategy(handle_errors=True) + the outer retry.

COVERAGE gaps closed:
- external: tests/external/test_workflow_live.py (live code_review run via RunnerAgentStep)
- contract: tests/interfaces/contracts/test_workflow_cli_output_contract.py (CLI json ↔ WORKFLOW_RUN)
- golden: tests/interfaces/contracts/test_workflow_schema_golden.py (frozen immutable v1 schema)
- crash-resume already covered (test_resume_skips_already_marked_step, test_comment_verdict_is_idempotent)

Full unit suite: 1428 passed, 1 skipped. New regression tests: 48 (hardening) + 5 (contracts).
